formatted_display: English: Monday, 11 May 2026 | Nepali: Monday, 28 Baishakh 2083
quote: The whole problem with the world is the fools and fanatics are always so sure of themselves, and wiser people are full of doubts.
formatted_quote: "The whole problem with the world is the fools and fanatics are always so sure of themselves, and wiser people are full of doubts." - George Bernard Shaw
